title: Fuzzer: Segfault on illegal pattern assignment
body:
---


Author Name: **Eric Rippey**
Original Redmine Issue: 1583 from https://www.veripool.org

Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder)

---

Running the attached testcase with:

verilator_bin --lint-only 1.sv

On version:

Verilator 4.020 devel rev v4.020-56-gbcb766b

Produces:
```
%Error: 1.sv:2: Unsupported/Illegal: Assignment pattern member not underneath a supported construct: LOGNOT
localparam i=!'{0};
               ^~
Segmentation fault (core dumped)

```

It seems like this might have something to do with the errored line being at the end of input after preprocessor expansion.
